descriptions.text: This hack adds 40 Odyssey-style Hint Art Stars to the original Super Mario 64.

One day, Mario recieved a strange package from his good buddy, Wario. The package contained a rude letter, along with a folder of several weird drawings and photos. Looks like Wario's up to no good - can Mario find the stolen Stars with Wario's Hints? And what's he up to, anyway?
